verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When God's people get together, We know that very soon, Wonderful things are gonna happen.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As His Spirit fills the room And right now, I am expecting Something special, something more As we're together again We're praising the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We're together again, praising the Lord, We're together again in one accord, Something good is gonna happen, Something good is in store We're together again, praising the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When God's people got together In the Upper Room They were waiting on the promise Of what Jesus said to do Then the Spirit fell from heaven Oh what joy did occur They were together up there They were praising the Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We're gonna tell Goodbye, "Goodbye"! When God's people get together In heaven by and by Oh my, what rejoicing, From this time forever more.
